Project listing performs database count and paginated queries; filtering is generally database-dependent, with name search using ILIKE. WebSocket broadcasts iterate linearly over all connections subscribed to a project. CRUD and authentication operations are database-bound. Notable concerns include hardcoded JWT/database credentials, wildcard CORS configuration with credentials enabled, unused imports, and broad exception handling. The global exception handler depends on JSONResponse imported later in the module, which is available by request time but is structurally fragile."}
